name: sources catalog: spans both the architecture and engineering source registries
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sources-catalog.sh" --out out.md --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
grep -q aws-well-architected out.md && grep -q hashicorp-terraform-style-guide out.md && grep -q nist-800-53 out.md && echo spans-both 1>&2
